mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.name, g.description, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN gm.is_delete = 'F0' THEN gm.user_id END) AS member_cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pm.is_delete = 'F0' AND p.status = 'K1' THEN pm.project_id END) AS project_cnt FROM groups g LEFT OUTER JOIN group_member gm ON g.id = gm.group_id AND gm.is_delete = 'F0' LEFT OUTER JOIN project_member pm ON g.id = pm.group_id AND pm.is_delete = 'F0' LEFT OUTER JOIN project p ON pm.project_id = p.id
g.is_delete = 'F0'
AND g.name LIKE '%' || #{name} || '%'
GROUP BY g.id, g.name, g.description ORDER BY g.id DESC
SELECT id, name, description, is_delete FROM groups WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 'F0'
SELECT u.id AS u_id, u.name AS u_name, u.email AS u_email FROM group_member gm JOIN users u ON gm.user_id = u.id WHERE gm.group_id = #{id} AND gm.is_delete = 'F0' AND u.status = 'H1'

SELECT p.id AS project_id, p.title AS project_name, LISTAGG(rm.role_id, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rm.role_id) AS role_id, LISTAGG((SELECT name FROM roles WHERE id = rm.role_id), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rm.role_id) AS role_name FROM project_member pm JOIN project p ON pm.project_id = p.id JOIN role_mapping rm ON pm.id = rm.member_id WHERE pm.group_id = #{id} AND pm.user_id IS NULL AND pm.is_delete = 'F0' AND p.is_lock = 'L0' AND p.status = 'K1' AND rm.is_inherited = 'P0' GROUP BY p.id, p.title
